name: copilot-resurrect
description: Automatically resurrects a dead GitHub Copilot Chat session by re-injecting your configured ignition prompt — keep autonomous coding loops alive overnight.

copilot-resurrect.enabled.description: Enable/disable the Copilot session resurrection watcher. When enabled, the watcher will automatically restart a dead Copilot Chat session using your ignition prompt.

copilot-resurrect.ignitionPrompt.description: The prompt to inject when resurrecting a dead Copilot Chat session. This should be your autonomous loop ignition prompt.

copilot-resurrect.silenceTimeoutSeconds.description: How many seconds of silence before declaring the Copilot Chat session dead and triggering resurrection. Default: 180s (3 minutes).

copilot-resurrect.maxRestartsPerDay.description: Maximum number of automatic session resurrections allowed per calendar day. Prevents infinite-loop storms. Default: 50.

copilot-resurrect.preferredModel.description: Preferred Copilot Chat model (informational — select via command 'Select Preferred Model'). The model must be set in the Copilot Chat UI dropdown.

copilot-resurrect.fallbackModel.description: Fallback model to suggest when the primary is rate-limited (informational — select via command 'Select Fallback Model').

copilot-resurrect.chatParticipant.description: Chat participant to prefix the ignition prompt with (e.g. 'copilot', 'workspace'). Leave blank for no prefix. Select via command 'Select Chat Participant'.

copilot-resurrect.agentMode.description: Agent mode to activate when resurrecting a session. Discovers custom agents from .github/agents/*.agent.md in the workspace. Select via command 'Select Agent Mode'.

enumDescriptions: Bypass Approvals — skip confirmation prompts (requires manual enable in new sessions)
Autopilot (Preview) — full autonomous mode (requires manual enable in new sessions)
copilot-resurrect.approvalsMode.description: Preferred approvals mode for resurrected sessions. Non-default modes will show a reminder to set this in the Copilot Chat UI when starting new sessions.

copilot-resurrect.rateLimitCooldownBaseS.description: Base cooldown seconds for rate-limit backoff. Each consecutive rate-limit doubles this (exponential backoff). Default: 30s.

copilot-resurrect.rateLimitCooldownMaxSe.description: Maximum cooldown seconds for exponential backoff cap. Default: 600s (10 minutes).

copilot-resurrect.startNewSession.description: Start a new chat session when resurrecting from silence (vs. retrying in the existing session). Error-based triggers (rate-limit, server errors) always retry in-place to preserve in-progress work.

copilot-resurrect.contentCheckEnabled.description: Enable content-based error detection. Reads Copilot Chat session files to detect rate-limit and server error messages. If disabled, only silence-based detection is used.

copilot-resurrect.watchPaths.description: Override the list of file-system paths the watcher monitors for Copilot Chat activity. Leave empty for automatic discovery (recommended).

commands.title: Copilot Resurrect: Reset Daily Restart Counter
